widgets_values: singing, subtitles, blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, unreadable text on shirt or hat, incorrect lettering on cap (“PNTR”), missing microphone, misplaced microphone, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, smiling, laughing, exaggerated sadness, wrong gaze direction, eyes looking at camera, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio, missing sniff sounds, incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, missing door or shelves, missing shallow depth of field, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts,dissolve, crossfade, fade transition, morphing, smooth transition, blending shots, gradient transition

{
  "global_prompt": "Cinematic 3D animated fantasy scene of Leah, a young explorer girl with brown ponytail, freckled face, large luminous blue eyes, wearing brown leather vest over off-white shirt, brown aviator goggles on forehead, fingerless gloves, satchel and cargo pants with worn lace-up leather boots, journeying through an enchanted bioluminescent forest at twilight, holding a softly glowing blue lantern, surrounded by towering glowing mushrooms with cyan caps, twisted moss-covered vine archways, curtains of luminescent willow leaves, deep green moss carpets and translucent floating jellyfish-like spirits drifting through misty air, dominant deep teal and cobalt blue palette with emerald green accents and warm lantern amber highlights, volumetric god rays and drifting glowing spores, painterly Pixar-quality rendering with soft cinematic depth of field, magical mysterious otherworldly atmosphere",
  "local_prompts": "Shot 1 wide establishing shot with slow push-in camera, Leah seen from behind walking toward a twisted vine archway in the bioluminescent forest, holding the glowing blue lantern in her right hand at her side, ponytail swaying gently with her steps, small silhouette dwarfed by towering glowing mushrooms with cyan caps, soft mist drifting across the moss path, ambient cyan-green glow rising from ferns and roots, no dialogue, ambient only | Shot 2 close-up arcing camera move from behind to front, Leah's face fills the frame in awe as both hands gently part curtains of glowing willow leaves, wide cyan-blue eyes shimmering with reflected light, freckles catching tiny sparkles, slow shallow breath of wonder, she whispers softly '它真的存在……', lips parted softly in reverent breath, expressive animated face conveying disbelief and quiet awe, micro head tilt upward | Shot 3 extreme close-up tilt-down following her arm to her boots, worn leather lace-up boots stepping onto deep green moss, each footfall sending concentric neon-blue ripple rings rolling outward across the mossy ground, tiny glowing spore particles lifting into the air around the soles, fine droplets of dew on moss strands catching the light, no dialogue, silent moment | Shot 4 wide shot with slow dolly-out anchored on a foreground floating jellyfish, translucent bioluminescent jellyfish-like spirits drifting and pulsing in midair like deep-sea breaths, Leah's small figure standing centered looking up with parted lips in quiet awe, head turning slowly to follow a passing spirit, her silhouette gradually receding as camera pulls back to reveal the vast misty luminous forest expanse, silent moment, ambient only",
  "segment_lengths": "90,105,60,105",
  "auto_split_timeline": null,
  "shot_breakdown": "Shot 1 (wide establishing + slow push-in, 3.0s / 0.0-3.0s, 无台词, 开场建立镜头需 ≥2s 呼吸感，远景+推移给观众进入异界的仪式感) | Shot 2 (close-up + arc to front, 3.5s / 3.0-6.5s, ★口播★ '它真的存在……', 5字慢语速呢喃约1.7s + 1s前缓冲 + 0.8s呢喃后停顿留白，近景情绪高点需要充足时长) | Shot 3 (extreme close-up + tilt-down, 2.0s / 6.5-8.5s, 无台词, 动作特写镜头压缩为短镜，制造剪辑张力对比上下两段长镜) | Shot 4 (wide + slow dolly-out, 3.5s / 8.5-12.0s, 无台词, 收尾镜头需 ≥2s，宏大拉远揭示幻境全貌，留白让观众沉浸)",
  "recommended_params": {
    "epsilon": 0.001,
    "resolution": "1216x704",
    "cfg": 3.2,
    "steps": 28
  },
  "ltxv_add_guide_multi": {
    "num_guides": 4,
    "frame_indices": [0, 90, 195, 255],
    "strengths": [1.0, 1.0, 0.9, 1.0],
    "anchor_strategy": "segment_start",
    "guide_image_mapping": "guide_1=Shot1左上分镜图(背影提马灯+藤蔓拱门+发光蘑菇全景), guide_2=Shot2右上分镜图(女孩正面惊叹+蓝光柳叶垂帘+大眼特写), guide_3=Shot3左下分镜图(皮靴踩苔藓+霓虹水波纹+光点), guide_4=Shot4右下分镜图(悬浮水母群+女孩远景仰望)",
    "strength_reasoning": "guide_1=1.0 开场强制锁定建立森林视觉基底与角色背影方位; guide_2=1.0 含口播台词需 ≥0.95 保证嘴脸稳定便于对口型，加上近景脸部+情绪高点权重，直接拉满; guide_3=0.9 基础0.85+大特写加权0.05，纯动作过渡镜头无需满锁，留出微动作空间; guide_4=1.0 收尾强制锁定，宏大拉远画面需要精准还原水母与人物比例",
    "notes": "frame_idx 为像素帧索引（节点内部自动换算到 latent 域）; 各 frame_idx 严格累加自 segment_lengths [90,105,60,105]; 最后一项 frame_idx=255 ≤ total_frames-1=359，余量校验通过"
  },
  "negative_prompt": "worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted face, deformed face, ugly, aged skin, wrinkles, asymmetric eyes, extra fingers, mutated hands, bad anatomy, static image, frozen, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, plastic skin, motion smear, transition cuts, scene change, text overlay, watermark",
  "meta": {
    "total_duration_seconds": 12,
    "fps": 30,
    "image_mode": "multi_panel",
    "panel_count": 4,
    "segment_count": 4,
    "lipsync_postprocess": true,
    "total_frames": 360,
    "timeline_source": "user_provided",
    "speech_rate_used": 3,
    "dialogue_segments": [2]
  }
}

Cinematic Pixar-style CG fantasy short, a 12-year-old explorer girl Leah with brown hair tied in a low ponytail, big sky-blue eyes, light freckles across nose and cheeks, soft pale skin, vintage brown leather aviator goggles resting on forehead, off-white long-sleeve henley shirt under a worn brown leather utility vest, dark olive cargo pants, scuffed brown lace-up leather boots, brown leather fingerless gloves, small brown satchel and utility belt at waist, holding a vintage brass lantern emitting soft cyan magical glow, set inside an enchanted bioluminescent forest with giant glowing mushrooms, twisted moss-covered vine archway, hanging luminous willow-leaf curtains in electric blue, deep emerald moss ground, floating translucent jellyfish-like spirit creatures drifting in misty air, swirling motes of blue light, atmospheric volumetric fog, dominant cool teal and cyan magical lighting accented by warm amber lantern glow, painterly cinematic depth of field, ultra-detailed 3D animation render

Shot 1 wide establishing shot with slow push-in from behind, Leah walks gently toward the glowing vine archway raising the brass lantern slightly with her right hand, head tilted up in quiet wonder, ponytail swaying softly with each step, faint breeze stirring loose strands of hair, ambient mushrooms pulsing with subtle bioluminescence around her, ambient only no dialogue | Shot 2 close-up frontal angle as camera arcs around to her face, both hands rising to gently part the hanging glowing willow-leaf strands, she holds her breath then breathlessly murmurs in a hushed reverent tone "它真的存在……", lips parted softly, expressive animated face conveying breathless awe, eyes wide and glistening with reflected blue light, eyebrows lifted in wonder, a single loose strand of hair brushing her freckled cheek, faint glittering particles drifting across her face | Shot 3 extreme close-up tilt-down following her arm down to her boots stepping onto deep green moss, leather creasing under weight, concentric neon-blue ripple rings radiating outward from each footfall, tiny glowing spore-like motes scattering upward into the air, moss compressing softly underfoot, silent moment ambient footsteps only no dialogue | Shot 4 wide dolly-out shot through foreground floating jellyfish creatures, Leah small and centered in the misty clearing gazing upward with quiet reverence, head turning slowly to follow a drifting spirit, arms relaxed at her sides, translucent jellyfish gently pulsing and undulating as they drift past lens, camera retreating smoothly to reveal the vast luminous forest, silent immersive finale no dialogue

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
